summary: Completed frontend testing of Iteration 104 features: Navigation restructuring and unified Retirement Planner. All navigation changes verified in code. Retirement Planner page loads with all 7 tabs (Overview, People, Assets, Income, Expenses, Assumptions, Projection). Features include multi-entity support (Personal, Joint, Company, Trust, SMSF), CGT modeling, couple planning, inflation/yield sliders, and one-off expenditures.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts chart sizing issue on initial render, resolves after interaction
Compliance modal appears on every page load even after accepting - localStorage key 'compliance_acknowledged' not being persisted correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts chart sizing warning in Projection tab - consider adding explicit minWidth/minHeight to chart containers
seed_data_creation: Default sample data included in RetirementPlanner.jsx state initialization
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retirement Planner at /retirement is fully functional with local state (no backend API calls). Navigation restructured: Execution section in Adviser Mode only has 'Batch Execute'. Plan section in client context has 'Goals' and 'Retirement'. Investments section has 'Transaction Modeler'. Compliance modal may block UI testing - need to dismiss it first.
